uuid.description: Full UUID generated on first boot

short_id.description: Last 6 characters of UUID used in hostname and BLE broadcast

initialised.description: True after core/initialise has run successfully. Prevents re-initialisation on subsequent boots.

registered_with_api.description: True after device has successfully registered with api.cdo-darts.com

claiming_token.description: Short-lived token returned by API on registration, used to claim the device in the app

claiming_token_expires.description: ISO timestamp after which the claiming token is invalid

api_base_url.description: Base URL for the CDO API e.g. https://api.cdo-darts.com

dashboard_port.description: Port the local dashboard runs on, default 8080
